top_signals.title: Emerging-Market Currencies Plunge on Blowout US Jobs Report
top_signals.summary: Currencies in the developing world sank after a blowout US jobs report provided the clearest sign yet that the labor market is breaking out of a prolonged period of lackluster hiring, undercutting the case for rate cuts from the Federal Reserve.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: SpaceX and Other Mega IPOs May Wait Years to Join the S&P 500
top_signals.summary: Mega-IPO candidates including SpaceX are expected to face a long road to entry to the S&P 500 Index, after the company that makes the rules rejected a proposal that included relaxing the requirement that they be profitable.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
